testcase.name: route_to_a2a

property.name: description
property.value: Verify E1C has route to A2A loopback 192.168.42.1 in VRF1

failure.message: Verify E1C has route to A2A loopback 192.168.42.1 in VRF1

testcase.failure: Assertion route_exists("192.168.42.1") returned False. NETCONF response contains VRF1 routing entries but 192.168.42.1/32 is not present in the RIB.

testcase.name: ospf_adj_e1c_c1j

property.name: description
property.value: Verify E1C has FULL OSPF adjacency with C1J (router-id 22.22.22.11)

failure.message: Verify E1C has FULL OSPF adjacency with C1J (router-id 22.22.22.11)

testcase.failure: Assertion ospf_neighbor_full("22.22.22.11") returned False. Neighbor 22.22.22.11 found but adjacency state is INIT, not FULL.

property.name: description
property.value: Verify route-map on E1C redistributes static route 10.99.99.0/24 to C1J via OSPF
